projects.raw_text:
Implement ARM Cortex M0 core with existing Standard Cell library and NTV library for different performance targets at SS, 1.08V, 125C and list cell library usage.

Jun 2020 – Jan 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Deliverables:
• Acquisition and study of M0 and M3 based on published work
for appropriate PPA targets. Moreover, synthesis and FE signoff of two cores for different performance targets by performing RTL to GDSII.
• Implement designs with NTV library and statistical sign-off.
• Implementation of 6 cores in layout and integration on test chip along with verification.

Industry Mentors:
Mr. Rohit Gupta (STMicroelectronics) 
Mr. Rajnish Garg (STMicroelectronics)

High Level synthesis of RISC Processor

Feb 2020 – May 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed the basic RISC toy processor by optimizing it for low area, low throughput and low latency using Catapult and verified using UVM libraries and QuestaSim. Code coverage was performed to test the reliability of processor

RTL to GDSII

Feb 2020 – May 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed the basic digital circuit for cell libraries using CAD tools to analyze trade-offs between PPA by writing the RTL Verilog code.
Performed Logic synthesis, Equivalence checking, DFT with STA.
Physical designing was carried out including Floorplanning, Place, and Route, CTS performed in Cadence Encounter.

Contribution: 
o	Produced gate-level netlist by synthesizing using RTL Compiler having a total of 329 cells with an area of 2925.39 µm2 with a slack of 4.283ns.
o	Conducted equivalence checking in Cadence Conformal to check whether the generated netlist based on the constraints is equivalent to RTL.
o	Accomplished Static Timing Analysis (STA) using Tempus on netlist by defining a wire load model to increase the setup slack but a hold violation is introduced which was rectified during CTS.
o	Implemented Design for Test (DFT) to check defects by inserting MUX-ed scan style. There was an increase in the area & power post-DFT by approximately 350 more cells.
o	Executed the physical design flow by considering the utilization factor of 0.5 and 0.8 during floor planning to avoid any routing issues that can implode in later stages.
o	Worked on placement and routing (PNR) using Encounter to optimize PPA. The slack of 0.136ps and increase in area by 6µm2 was found post-placement.

Analyzing the effect of the HMC model on system performance 

Aug 2019 – Nov 2019


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Analyzing the effect of employing the HMC model on the system performance and create network of HMCs connected to at least one host processor. Simulated the HMC model present in gem5 and run different benchmarks and observe the effect on DRAM efficiency using HMC based model.

Domino Logic AOI 221 circuit implementations with layout

Sep 2019 – Nov 2019


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Full custom design of AND-OR-INVERTER 221 cells and simulation.
Statistical analysis of cells to determine rise delay, fall delay and power. Proposed methodology to proper sizing of devices in a cell for better PPA. Designed the library layout and schematic.

Contribution:
o	Crafted library layout and its schematic in Cadence Virtuoso.
o	Performed LVS, DRC, and parasitic extraction.
o	Executed Eldo Spice simulation at SS, 40oC, 1.2 V.
o	Analyzed the power which was 0.69pW and layout area of 20.832 µm2. 

Low Power operation of Op-Amp in Sub-threshold region

Sep 2019 – Nov 2019


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Operating at low voltage would lead to low power at sub-threshold.
This would help in designing the low-voltage low power application circuits.
